inputs.label: Basic Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.businessContext: Bearing dynamic load rating from manufacturer catalog

businessContext_i18n.en: Bearing dynamic load rating from manufacturer catalog
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretici kataloğundan rulman dinamik yük değeri
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamische Tragzahl des Lagers aus Herstellerkatalog
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge dynamique de base du roulement selon catalogue fabricant
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad de carga dinámica del rodamiento según catálogo del fabricante
businessContext_i18n.ar: تصنيف الحمولة الديناميكي للمحمل من كتالوج الشركة المصنعة

inputs.label: Equivalent Dynamic Load (P)
inputs.businessContext: Calculated equivalent radial/axial load on bearing

businessContext_i18n.en: Calculated equivalent radial/axial load on bearing
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rulman üzerinde hesaplanan eşdeğer radyal/eksenel yük
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge radiale/axiale équivalente calculée sur le roulement
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga radial/axial equivalente calculada sobre el rodamiento
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحمولة المكافئة الشعاعية/المحورية المحسوبة على المحمل

inputs.label: Life Exponent
inputs.businessContext: p=3 for ball bearings, p=10/3 (≈3.333) for roller bearings

businessContext_i18n.en: p=3 for ball bearings, p=10/3 (≈3.333) for roller bearings
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilyalı rulmanlar için p=3, makaralı rulmanlar için p=10/3 (≈3.333)
businessContext_i18n.de: p=3 für Kugellager, p=10/3 (≈3,333) für Rollenlager
businessContext_i18n.fr: p=3 pour roulements à billes, p=10/3 (≈3,333) pour roulements à rouleaux
businessContext_i18n.es: p=3 para rodamientos de bolas, p=10/3 (≈3.333) para rodamientos de rodillos
businessContext_i18n.ar: p=3 للمحامل الكروية، p=10/3 (≈3.333) للمحامل الأسطوانية

inputs.label: Reliability Factor (a₁)
inputs.businessContext: 1 for 90% reliability; e.g., 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96% per ISO 281

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for 90% reliability; e.g., 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96% per ISO 281
businessContext_i18n.tr: %90 güvenilirlik için 1; ISO 281'e göre %95 için 0.62, %96 için 0.53
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für 90% Zuverlässigkeit; z.B. 0,62 für 95%, 0,53 für 96% gemäß ISO 281
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour fiabilité 90 % ; ex. 0,62 pour 95 %, 0,53 pour 96 % selon ISO 281
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para fiabilidad del 90%; p. ej., 0.62 para 95%, 0.53 para 96% según ISO 281
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 لموثوقية 90%؛ مثلاً 0.62 لـ95%، 0.53 لـ96% وفقًا لـISO 281

inputs.label: Rotational Speed
inputs.businessContext: Shaft speed; used to convert revolutions to hours

businessContext_i18n.en: Shaft speed; used to convert revolutions to hours
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mil hızı; devirleri saate dönüştürmek için kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Wellendrehzahl; dient zur Umrechnung von Umdrehungen in Stunden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de l'arbre ; utilisée pour convertir les révolutions en heures
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del eje; se utiliza para convertir revoluciones en horas
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة العمود؛ تستخدم لتحويل الدورات إلى ساعات
